title: No names
description: This plugin automatically hides player name tags.
body:
This plugin automatically hides player name tags

 by adding joining players to a scoreboard team
whose name tag visibility is set to NEVER. It also (optionally) clears the player's tab-list name. 

**After reloading or restarting the plugin, players must rejoin the server for the name tag hiding to apply correctly.**

Made by Hargrefs and Rayan
